emotional_tone: Reliable, Fast, Authoritative, Safe, Industrial, Urgent

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#211d1b]/60

header.mobile: Logo perfectly absolute-centered. Hamburger icon on right.
header.desktop: Logo left, links center, prominent 'Ligar Agora' button right.

hero.style: min-h-[90vh] flex items-center relative overflow-hidden bg-[#211d1b] pt-[100px]
hero.background: Use image 'background_asphalt' with a heavy bg-[#211d1b]/85 overlay. Add a subtle radial gradient behind text.
hero.content: Huge typography H1 left aligned. Text: 'AUTO SOCORRO GOIANÁPOLIS'. Focus on 24/7 service. Two large CTAs: Yellow 'Ligar Agora' and Outline 'WhatsApp'. Include 'react-fast-marquee' near the bottom acting as an 'Editorial Ribbon' reading 'ATENDIMENTO 24 HORAS - GOIANÁPOLIS E REGIÃO - GUINCHO LEVE E PESADO'.

about.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-24. Left side: Text and trust markers. Right side: Image gallery overlapping (Grid Borders style).
about.details: High contrast typography. Highlight 24/7 reliability and region.

services.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid). 6 services (Guincho leve, pesado, transporte agrícola, auto socorro 24h, atendimento rodoviário, transporte programado).
services.card_style: Sharp edges, 1px border border-[#eaebea]/10, hover:border-[#f4eb24] hover:bg-[#eaebea]/5 transition-all duration-300. Solid color, minimal layout. Yellow icon on top left.

differentiators.layout: Grid Borders Look. Grid cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. 7 items, last one can span 2 cols.
differentiators.visuals: Big `#f4eb24` colored background icons in dark squares, bold titles, minimal description. The Grid Borders look (technical, borders on right and bottom).

gallery.layout: Masonry or asymmetrical grid of the 4 service images. Minimal gaps (gap-2 or gap-4). Images should have hover:scale-105 transition.

coverage_area.layout: Two columns. Huge typography for regions, showing dominance. Use MapPin icon.

emergency_call.content: Massive yellow text for phone numbers: (62) 98404-3652 / 99156-3645. Focus on extreme urgency. Center alignment for max impact.

reviews.layout: 3-column grid of review cards. Minimalist design: quote, stars in yellow, name.

footer.layout: Massive logo/text on top, multi-column links below, strict grid structure. Note the extra bottom padding on mobile to account for fixed buttons.

floating_actions.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full z-50 flex border-t border-[#211d1b]/20 lg:hidden. Two buttons 50% width. Left: 'Ligar' (bg-[#211d1b] text-[#f4eb24]). Right: 'WhatsApp' (bg-[#25D366] text-white).
floating_actions.desktop: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 hidden lg:flex. Circular WhatsApp button with pulse animation.

buttons.primary: bg-[#f4eb24] text-[#211d1b] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#dcd312] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-5 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 w-fit
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#f4eb24] text-[#f4eb24] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#f4eb24]/10 transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-5 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 w-fit
buttons.dark: bg-[#211d1b] text-[#eaebea] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#1a1715] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-5 flex items-center justify-center gap-3 w-fit

service_1.description: Tow truck in action - light towing

background_asphalt.description: Dark asphalt texture for hero section

background_pattern.description: Industrial warning stripes pattern for emergency call CTA section

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: You are working with React .js files, NOT .tsx. Use standard JS/JSX syntax.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for layout. Do NOT use Shadcn cards for main sections; build custom divs to match the brutalist/industrial aesthetic with sharp corners (rounded-none).
Ensure the color palette uses EXCLUSIVELY the provided hex codes: #eaebea, #211d1b, #f4eb24. Do not use generic tailwind slate/gray classes.
Implement the Mobile-first fixed floating action bar at the bottom: 2 buttons (Ligar, WhatsApp) taking up exactly 50% width each, visible ONLY on mobile (lg:hidden).
On desktop, show a fixed circular WhatsApp button in the bottom right corner with a subtle pulse animation (hidden on mobile).
In the mobile Header, use absolute positioning (left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2) to perfectly center the logo, and put the hamburger menu on the right edge.
Use `lucide-react` for all icons (Phone, MapPin, Truck, AlertTriangle, ShieldCheck).
Add `react-fast-marquee` package and use it as a 'Kinetic Texture' banner in the Hero section.

Ensure typography matches the bold industrial vibe: Use standard Google fonts imports for 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or similar like 'Outfit' or 'Oswald' if Grotesk isn't directly on Google Fonts, but prefer local/font-face or a strong alternative like 'Oswald' for headers) and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
Add `data-testid` to all CTA buttons, like `data-testid='hero-call-btn'`, `data-testid='mobile-whatsapp-btn'`.
